name: Chronomancer
description: A class focused on time magic, battlefield control, and delayed effects.

skill.name: Temporal Bolt
skill.description: Deal force damage and slow the target for a short time.

buffDebuff.name: Slowed by Time
buffDebuff.description: The target is caught in a delayed moment.

feat.name: Time Sense
feat.description: You can sense temporal distortions and react before they fully unfold.

buffDebuff.name: Temporal Focus
buffDebuff.description: You briefly sharpen your focus by synchronizing with the next moment.

subclass.name: Keeper of Seconds
subclass.description: A subclass focused on precise timing, interrupts, and initiative control.

skill.name: Borrowed Future
skill.description: Pull power from your next turn and release it now.
